reviews.comment:
La estación tiene muchísimo movimiento, pero el servicio gastronómico deja bastante que desear. El “servicio full” no es realmente completo: solo ofrecen sándwiches empaquetados y no preparan hamburguesas en el momento como sucede en otras estaciones. La carta es muy limitada para la cantidad de gente que la frecuenta. Podrían mejorar bastante la oferta para estar a la altura de la demanda.

(Translated by Google)
The station is incredibly busy, but the food service leaves much to be desired. The "full service" isn't truly comprehensive: they only offer pre-packaged sandwiches and don't make burgers to order like other stations do. The menu is very limited for the number of people who frequent it. They could significantly improve their offerings to meet the demand.
reviews.name: accounts/109853746269412609224/locations/1988985900989530919/reviews/ChdDSUhNMG9nS0VNcUY0ZkxkNWZxVjR3RRAB
